## Basic Ideas and Concepts

:::: {.rows}

::: {.row height=30%}
* separation model specification from code implementation (PDF for brain simulation)
* One specification - multiple backends
:::

::: {.row}
![](figures/tvbo-network-insets.png){height=500px fig-align="center"}
:::

::::

## A Simulation Experiment with `TVB-O`

```{=html}
<style>
.se-dia {
  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #f4f8f8, #e4edef);
  border: 2px solid #9ab5b8; border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 20px 22px 18px; width: 100%; box-sizing:border-box;
  margin: 0 auto; box-shadow: 0 6px 32px rgba(43,122,120,.1);
}
.se-dia .hdr { text-align:center; font-size:1.15em; font-weight:700; color:#2b6b6b; letter-spacing:.03em; margin-bottom:12px; }
.se-dia .top { display:grid; grid-template-columns:3fr 2fr; grid-template-rows:auto auto; gap:10px; margin-bottom:12px; }
.se-dia .top .net { grid-row:1/3; }
.se-dia .bot { display:flex; gap:10px; }
.se-dia .g { border:1.5px dashed; border-radius:12px; padding:10px 12px 12px; min-width:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
.se-dia .gl { font-size:.54em; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.09em; margin-bottom:6px; padding-left:2px; }
.se-dia .pp { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:5px 6px; align-items:center; }
.se-dia .p  { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:16px; font-size:.52em; font-weight:500; white-space:nowrap; border:1.2px solid; line-height:1.3; }
.se-dia .sub { border-radius:9px; padding:7px 10px 8px; margin-top:7px; }
.se-dia .sub .gl { font-size:.48em; margin-bottom:3px; }
.se-dia .f1  { flex:1; }
.se-dia .f08 { flex:.8; }
.se-dia .arr { font-size:.48em; color:#6a9a9a; margin:0 2px; line-height:1; font-weight:300; }
.se-dia .p.opt { border-style:dashed; opacity:.7; }
/* Network: blue */
.g.c-net        { border-color:#8bbde0; background:rgba(200,225,240,.25); }
.g.c-net > .gl  { color:#2e6e9c; }
.p.c-net        { background:#9dd0f0; border-color:#5ea8d4; color:#1a4a6e; }
.g.c-net .sub        { border:1.2px solid #a8d0e8; background:rgba(210,230,245,.35); }
.g.c-net .sub .gl    { color:#4a8ab8; }
.p.c-dyn        { background:#bee0f4; border-color:#7ec0e0; color:#1e5a80; }
.p.c-cpl        { background:#d0e8f6; border-color:#98cce6; color:#2a6890; }
/* Integration: teal */
.g.c-int        { border-color:#7abab8; background:rgba(180,220,218,.25); }
.g.c-int > .gl  { color:#2b6b6b; }
.p.c-int        { background:#8ad0cc; border-color:#52a8a4; color:#1a4e4e; }
/* Event: amber */
.g.c-evt        { border-color:#d4c4a0; background:rgba(230,218,195,.25); }
.g.c-evt > .gl  { color:#8a6a30; }
.p.c-evt        { background:#e8d4b0; border-color:#c8a870; color:#5a4420; }
.g.c-evt .sub        { border:1.2px solid #d8c8a8; background:rgba(235,225,205,.35); }
.g.c-evt .sub .gl    { color:#9a7a40; }
.p.c-stm        { background:#f0e0c4; border-color:#d4b888; color:#6a5030; }
/* Observation: cyan-teal */
.g.c-obs        { border-color:#88c4c4; background:rgba(190,225,225,.25); }
.g.c-obs > .gl  { color:#2e7070; }
.p.c-obs        { background:#98d4d0; border-color:#5eb0ac; color:#1a5050; }
/* Exploration: green */
.g.c-exp        { border-color:#98c8a4; background:rgba(200,230,210,.25); }
.g.c-exp > .gl  { color:#3a7048; }
.p.c-exp        { background:#a8d8b4; border-color:#70b480; color:#1e4a2a; }
/* Analysis: slate blue */
.g.c-ana        { border-color:#98a8c4; background:rgba(200,210,228,.25); }
.g.c-ana > .gl  { color:#3a5070; }
.p.c-ana        { background:#b0c0d8; border-color:#7898b8; color:#1e3450; }
/* Environment: warm gray */
.g.c-env        { border-color:#b0b8b8; background:rgba(215,220,220,.25); }
.g.c-env > .gl  { color:#505858; }
.p.c-env        { background:#c4cccc; border-color:#94a0a0; color:#2a3434; }
</style>
<div class="se-dia">
  <div class="hdr">SimulationExperiment</div>
  <div class="top">
    <div class="g c-net net">
      <div class="gl">Network</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-net opt">Parcellation</span>
        <span class="arr">⟶</span>
        <span class="p c-net">Node</span>
        <span class="arr">⟶</span>
        <span class="p c-net">Edge</span>
      </div>
      <div class="sub">
        <div class="gl">Dynamics</div>
        <div class="pp">
          <span class="p c-dyn">StateVariable</span>
          <span class="p c-dyn">Parameter</span>
          <span class="p c-dyn">Equation</span>
          <span class="p c-dyn">DerivedVariable</span>
          <span class="p c-dyn">DerivedParameter</span>
          <span class="p c-dyn">Function</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sub">
        <div class="gl">Coupling</div>
        <div class="pp">
          <span class="p c-cpl">Parameter</span>
          <span class="p c-cpl">Equation</span>
          <span class="p c-cpl">IncomingState</span>
          <span class="p c-cpl">LocalState</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="g c-int">
      <div class="gl">Integration</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-int">Method</span>
        <span class="p c-int">Noise</span>
        <span class="p c-int">InitialCondition</span>
        <span class="p c-int">TimeSeries</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="g c-evt">
      <div class="gl">Event</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-evt">Equation</span>
        <span class="p c-evt">Target</span>
      </div>
      <div class="sub">
        <div class="gl">Stimulus</div>
        <div class="pp">
          <span class="p c-stm">Waveform</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="bot">
    <div class="g c-obs f1">
      <div class="gl">Observation</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-obs">Source</span>
        <span class="p c-obs">Pipeline</span>
        <span class="arr">⟶</span>
        <span class="p c-obs">DataSource</span>
        <span class="p c-obs">DerivedObs.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="g c-exp f08">
      <div class="gl">Exploration</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-exp">Exploration</span>
        <span class="p c-exp">Algorithm</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="g c-ana f08">
      <div class="gl">Analysis</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-ana">Optimization</span>
        <span class="p c-ana">Continuation</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="g c-env f1">
      <div class="gl">Environment</div>
      <div class="pp">
        <span class="p c-env">SoftwareEnv.</span>
        <span class="p c-env">Execution</span>
        <span class="p c-env">Reference</span>
        <span class="p c-env">Author</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## What's New?

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis

# Edit this list: (label, image_path_or_None, sub_items_or_None)
# Paths relative to presentation/ root (not Slides/) because include flattens
features = [
    ("Heterogeneous Networks", "Slides/figures/gallery/HetMod.png", ["Model per Node"]),
    ("Edge Dynamics", "Slides/figures/gallery/cell-5-output-1.png", ["Dynamic Coupling", "Plasticity"]),
    ("NeuroML Support", "Slides/figures/gallery/NeuroML.png", ["Spiking Networks", "Channel Dynamics"]),
    ("Julia NetworkDynamics Support", "Slides/figures/gallery/JuliaND.png", ["Code Generation", "Directed Graphs"]),
    ("ModelingToolkit.jl Integration", "Slides/figures/gallery/ModelingToolkit.png", ["2nd Order ODEs", "Symbolic Interop"]),
    # ("Discrete Models", "Slides/figures/gallery/discrete.png", None),
    ("PDEs", "Slides/figures/gallery/pde.gif", ["Neural Fields", "Spatial Dynamics"]),
    ("Bifurcation Analysis", "Slides/figures/gallery/bifurcation.png", ["Fixed Points", "Continuation"]),
    ("Model Fitting", "Slides/figures/gallery/sc_to_fc.gif", ["Gradient-Based", "Differentiable Simulation"]),
    ("BIDS Export", "Slides/figures/gallery/BIDS.png", ["BEP034", "Standardized Output"]),
    ("OpenMINDS", "Slides/figures/gallery/openMINDS_logo_light.png", ["Knowledge Graphs", "EBRAINS"]),
    ("Stochastic Parameters (RDEs)", "Slides/figures/gallery/stochastic_parameters.png", ["Distributions over Parameters", "Random ODEs"]),
    # ("Stochastic Integration", None, None),
    (
        "New Backends",
        "Slides/figures/gallery/backends.gif",
        [
            "Jax",
            "tvboptim",
            "PyRates",
            "Julia",
            "CUDA",
            "NeuroML",
            "*Neuroblox*",
            "*tvb-cpp*",
            "*jaxley*",
        ],
    ),
]

placeholder = '<div class="card-placeholder">📌</div>'

print('<div class="feature-gallery">')
for label, img, subs in features:
    print('<div class="card">')
    if img:
        print(f'<img src="{img}" alt="{label}"/>')
    else:
        print(placeholder)
    print(f'<div class="card-label">{label}</div>')
    if subs:
        print('<div class="card-subs">' + " · ".join(subs) + "</div>")
    print("</div>")
print("</div>")
```

## Specify Dynamical System {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=1}

```yaml
name: PendulumSystem
parameters:
    c:
        value: 0.001
        unit: 1/ms
        description: damping coefficient
    omega0:
        value: 0.01
        unit: rad/ms
        description: natural frequency
    L:
        value: 1.0
        unit: m
        description: rod length

state_variables:
    theta:
        unit: rad
        initial_value: 1.0
        equation: {rhs: omega}
    omega:
        unit: rad/ms
        initial_value: 0.0
        equation: {rhs: -c*omega - omega0**2 * sin(theta)}
```
:::
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}
```python
from tvbo import Dynamics
pendulum = Dynamics.from_string(dynamics_yaml)
pendulum.render('report')
```
:::


::: {.fragment fragment-index=3 style="font-size: 0.9em;"}

#### PendulumSystem

##### State Equations
$$
\dot{\theta} = \omega
$$
$$
\dot{\omega} = - c*\omega - \omega_{0}^{2}*\sin{\left(\theta \right)}
$$

##### Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Value** | **Unit** | **Description** |
|---------------|-----------|----------|-----------------|
| $c$ | 0.001 | $\mathrm{ms}^{-1}$ | damping coefficient |
| $\omega_{0}$ | 0.01 | $\frac{\mathrm{rad}}{\mathrm{ms}}$ | natural frequency |
| $L$ | 1.0 | $\mathrm{m}$ | rod length |
:::

:::

::::

## Specify Dynamical System

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

```python
from tvbo.datamodel.schema import DerivedVariable

pendulum.dynamics.derived_variables["x"] = DerivedVariable(
    name="x",
    equation={"rhs": "L * sin(theta)"},
    unit="m",
    description="X coordinate of the pendulum bob",
)
pendulum.dynamics.derived_variables["y"] = DerivedVariable(
    name="y",
    equation={"rhs": "-L * cos(theta)"},
    unit="m",
    description="Y coordinate of the pendulum bob",
)

pendulum.render('jax')
```

::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}
```
import jax.numpy as jnp
import jax.scipy as jsp


def dfun(current_state, t, cX, _p):
    # Parameters
    c = _p.c
    omega0 = _p.omega0
    L = _p.L

    # State variables
    theta = current_state[0]
    omega = current_state[1]

    # Derived variables
    x = L * jnp.sin(theta)
    y = -L * jnp.cos(theta)

    # Derivatives
    dtheta_dt = omega
    domega_dt = -c * omega - omega0**2 * jnp.sin(theta)

    derivatives = jnp.array([dtheta_dt, domega_dt])

    return derivatives

```
:::

:::


::: {.column}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=3}
```python
SimulationExperiment(
  dynamics=pendulum,
  ).run()
```
:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=4}
![](figures/pendulum.gif){height=550px}
:::

:::
::::


## Specify Network

```{python}
#| code-line-numbers: "1-4|6-9|11-13|14-16|17-19|"
#| echo: true
#| output-location: column

from tvbo import Network

net = Network.from_string("""
label: Visual Pathway

nodes:
  - {id: 0, label: V1}
  - {id: 1, label: V2}
  - {id: 2, label: MT}

edges:
  - source: 0
    target: 1
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.7
      distance:
        value: 25
        unit: mm
  - source: 1
    target: 2
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.4
      distance:
        value: 40
        unit: mm
  - source: 0
    target: 2
    parameters:
      weight:
        value: 0.2
      distance:
        value: 60
        unit: mm
""")

net.plot_graph()
```

## Network Database

```{python}
# | echo: true
# | output-location: column
# | fig-height: 200px

dk = Network.from_db(
  atlas="DesikanKilliany",
  rec="avgMatrix",
  )

dk.plot_overview(log_weights=True)
```

## Full Experiments - Jansen & Rit (1995): Fig. 11 VEP delayed columns {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
**Original** [@Jansen1995]

![](figures/jansen1995/original/fig_11.png)
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
```yaml
- id: 6
  label: "VEP: different columns, with delay
          (Fig. 11)"
  dynamics:
    name: JansenRit1995_Delayed_VEP
    parameters:
      A: {value: 3.25, unit: mV}
      B: {value: 22, unit: mV}
      C: {value: 135}
      a: {value: 100, unit: s^-1}
      b: {value: 50, unit: s^-1}
      v0: {value: 6, unit: mV}
      e0: {value: 2.5, unit: s^-1}
      r: {value: 0.56, unit: mV^-1}
      p:
        value: 220
        unit: s^-1
        shape: "(n_nodes,)"
        distribution: *dist_p_uniform
      a_d: {value: 30, unit: s^-1}
      K: {value: 0, shape: "(n_nodes,)"}
    derived_parameters: *jr_derived
    functions: *jr_functions
    coupling_terms: *jr_coupling
    state_variables:
      y0: {equation: {rhs: y3}}
      y3:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*Sigm(y1 - y2)
            - 2*a*y3 - a**2*y0
      y1: {equation: {rhs: y4}}
      y4:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a*(p + P
            + C2*Sigm(C1*y0) + z0)
            - 2*a*y4 - a**2*y1
      y2: {equation: {rhs: y5}}
      y5:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            B*b*(C4*Sigm(C3*y0))
            - 2*b*y5 - b**2*y2
      z0: {equation: {rhs: z1}}
      z1:
        equation:
          rhs: >-
            A*a_d*K*c_intercolumn
            - 2*a_d*z1 - a_d**2*z0
    derived_variables:
      v_pyr: {equation: {rhs: y1 - y2}}
    output: [v_pyr]
  network:
    number_of_regions: 2
    number_of_nodes: 2
    conduction_speed: {value: 0}
    nodes:
      - {id: 0}
      - id: 1
        parameters:
          B: {value: 17.6}
          C: {value: 108}
    edges:
      - source: 0
        target: 1
        directed: true
      - source: 1
        target: 0
        directed: true
    coupling: *sigmoidal_coupling
  events: *flash_events
  integration: *integration_vep
  execution:
    random_seed: 42
  explorations:
    VEP_delayed_fig11:
      mode: zip
      n_trials: 40
      average: trials
      parameters:
        K:
          element_domains:
            - element: 0
              explored_values: [300, 100]
            - element: 1
              explored_values: [1000, 4000]
```
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
**Reproduced**

![](figures/jansen1995/reproduced/Jansen1995_Fig11.png)
:::

::::


## {background-iframe="https://tvbo.charite.de/" background-interactive=true}


## {background-iframe="https://virtual-twin.github.io/tvbo" background-interactive=true}

## `bsplot` - Am Open Source `B`rain `S`imulation `Plot`ting Library

![https://github.com/virtual-twin/bsplot](Slides/figures/bsplot.png)

## {background-iframe="https://martinl.git-pages.bihealth.org/bsplot/Usage" background-interactive=true}
